approaches.title: Recursive depth-first computation
approaches.summary: Computes the maximum binary-tree depth recursively by taking one plus the maximum depth of the left and right subtrees. Revision 2 expresses the same strategy,

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Uses a nested recursive DFS with an explicit depth parameter and returns the maximum depth reached.

revisions.rawCommitSubject: rust 104: more idomatic bottom up recursion
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Refactors to idiomatic bottom-up recursion: the empty tree has depth 0, otherwise returns 1 plus the maximum recursive06
